top_signals.title: Trump says it's not a 'war.' Insurers with money on the line say it is
top_signals.summary: Businesses in the Middle East bought insurance that protects against terrorism or sabotage, but far fewer purchased coverage explicitly designed to cover "war."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
